title: taliera gembanga
side_effects: Taliera gembanga can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing stomach ulcers and digestive issues due to excessive consumption of its extract. In some cases, it can also lead to allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use or high doses of the plant's extract may cause liver damage and kidney problems, which can be irreversible if not treated promptly. Furthermore, improper use of Taliera gembanga can also interact negatively with other medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
